ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the course was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the course was last updated */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty overseeing the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculty ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "layers" (
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each layer */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course this layer belongs to */,
  "layer_title" TEXT /* Title of the content layer */,
  "layer_content" TEXT /* Content of the layer (text, video link, etc.) */,
  "sequence" INTEGER /* Sequence number indicating the order of the layer */,
  "layer_type" TEXT /* Type of the layer (e.g., video, text, quiz) */,
  "layer_url" TEXT /* URL of the layer (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("layer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_layers_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the institution */,
  "program" TEXT /* Academic program the student is enrolled in */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected graduation date of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Enrollment status (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Final grade received by the student (if completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the faculty member */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the faculty member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the faculty member */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the faculty member (e.g., Professor, Assistant Professor) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the faculty member belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "canvas_data" (
  "canvas_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each canvas interaction */,
  "_pw_id" INTEGER /* ID for the specific interaction (from the external source) */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student interacting with the content */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., view, click) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_time" TEXT /* Time of the interaction */,
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the layer being interacted with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("canvas_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_canvas_data_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_canvas_data_layer_id FOREIGN KEY ("layer_id") REFERENCES layers ("layer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "canvas_id" INTEGER /* ID of the canvas interaction being analyzed */,
  "offscreen_time" INTEGER /* Time spent offscreen during the interaction */,
  "next_index" INTEGER /* Index of the next content layer to be engaged */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Engagement score calculated based on interaction data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_canvas_id FOREIGN KEY ("canvas_id") REFERENCES canvas_data ("canvas_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_instructors" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the instructor in the course (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id", "faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who made the submission */,
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the layer being submitted (assignment or quiz) */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the submission was made */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received for the submission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_submissions_layer_id FOREIGN KEY ("layer_id") REFERENCES layers ("layer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_submissions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipient (student or instructor) */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course related to the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES faculty ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "layout" TEXT /* Layout of the dashboard (e.g., JSON representation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "widgets" (
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each widget */,
  "widget_name" TEXT /* Name of the widget */,
  "widget_type" TEXT /* Type of the widget (e.g., chart, table) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the widget */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("widget_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboard_widgets" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard */,
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* ID of the widget */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the widget on the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id", "widget_id")
)
